description_long: This is a large, modern black SUV with a robust and boxy profile, featuring a prominent chrome front grille and sleek, angular headlights. The vehicle has tinted windows, roof rails, and a panoramic sunroof, giving it a premium and urban-ready appearance. Its body is finished in glossy black paint, with subtle chrome accents along the window trim and door handles. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with a metallic finish, and the tires are designed for both city and light off-road use. The rear of the SUV includes a wide tailgate, integrated taillights, and a visible rear wiper. The overall design suggests a spacious interior, likely with three rows of seating and ample cargo space, suitable for families or group travel in urban environments.
description: A large, glossy black SUV with chrome accents, tinted windows, and multi-spoke alloy wheels, designed for urban and family use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide chrome grille, angular headlights, and a bold, upright stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, tinted windows, roof rails, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide tailgate, integrated taillights, and rear wiper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same elongated profile, wheels, and window design.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a metallic finish
